description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a rectangular footprint and a modern, clean-lined exterior. The facade is clad in light gray horizontal siding, and the house features a prominent covered front porch supported by white columns, with steps leading up to the entry. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard includes a wooden deck, a round outdoor table with an umbrella, and a fenced-in area with a tree and additional landscaping. The roof is flat and dark-colored, contrasting with the lighter walls, and the property is enclosed by a white fence for privacy. The overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern two-story house with light gray siding, a flat dark roof, a covered front porch, and a fenced backyard with a deck and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch with white columns, steps, and the main entryway.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the backyard deck, round table with umbrella, and part of the fenced yard.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the fenced backyard, tree, deck, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, side windows, and the transition between the porch and backyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with white columns, steps, and a single main door
